channel.title: GLUE on Sukai Huang
channel.description: Recent content in GLUE on Sukai Huang

item.title: Thang_m_pham Out of Order How Important Is the Sequential Order of Words in a Sentence in Natural Language Understanding Tasks 2021
item.description: [TOC] Title: Out of Order: How Important Is The Sequential Order of Words in a Sentence in Natural Language Understanding Tasks? Author: Thang M. Pham Publish Year: Jul 2021 Review Date: Feb 2022 Summary of paper The author found out that BERT-based models trained on GLUE have low sensitivity to word orders. The research questions are the following Do BERT-based models trained on GLUE care about the order of words in a sentence?
